title: lonchocarpus costaricensis
intro: Lonchocarpus costaricensis, also known as the Guanacaste tree, is a plant species native to Central America, belonging to the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly the seeds, which contain a compound called rotenone, a natural insecticide with potential health benefits. The health benefits of Lonchocarpus costaricensis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and protect against cell damage. Lonchocarpus costaricensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and its seeds can be crushed and added to traditional medicine preparations, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
